# Test Scenarios Reference

**Jira:** PROJ-1 ‚Äî Create a GET API endpoint to parse country name and return the capital
**Generated by:** doc-generator agent (TDD pipeline)
**Date:** 2026-04-09
**Status:** GREEN ‚Äî 70/70 tests passing, 97% coverage

---

## Feature Overview

REST API endpoint that accepts a country name and returns the corresponding capital city.

**Tech Stack:** Python 3.9 ¬∑ FastAPI 0.115 ¬∑ pytest 8.3 ¬∑ httpx

**Base URL (local):** `http://localhost:8000`

---

## API Contract

### `GET /countries/{country_name}/capital`

| Field | Details |
|-------|---------|
| Method | GET |
| Path | `/countries/{country_name}/capital` |
| Auth | None |
| Rate limit | None |

**Path Parameters**

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `country_name` | string | Yes | Name of the country (case-insensitive) |

**Success Response ‚Äî 200 OK**
```json
{
  "country": "France",
  "capital": "Paris"
}
```

**Error Response ‚Äî 404 Not Found**
```json
{
  "detail": "Country not found: Wakanda"
}
```

**Error Response ‚Äî 400 Bad Request**
```json
{
  "detail": "Invalid country name"
}
```

---

### `GET /health`

| Field | Details |
|-------|---------|
| Method | GET |
| Path | `/health` |

**Response ‚Äî 200 OK**
```json
{
  "status": "healthy"
}
```

---

## Test Scenarios

### Unit Tests ‚Äî Service Layer (`tests/unit/test_country_service.py`)

#### TestGetCapital ‚Äî 17 tests

| # | Test Name | Input | Expected | Category |
|---|-----------|-------|----------|----------|
| 1 | `test_get_capital_france_returns_paris` | `"France"` | `"Paris"` | Happy path |
| 2 | `test_get_capital_germany_returns_berlin` | `"Germany"` | `"Berlin"` | Happy path |
| 3 | `test_get_capital_japan_returns_tokyo` | `"Japan"` | `"Tokyo"` | Happy path |
| 4 | `test_get_capital_united_states_returns_washington` | `"United States"` | `"Washington, D.C."` | Multi-word |
| 5 | `test_get_capital_united_kingdom_returns_london` | `"United Kingdom"` | `"London"` | Multi-word |
| 6 | `test_get_capital_known_countries_parametrized` (√ó15) | 15 countries | Correct capitals | Parametrized |
| 7 | `test_get_capital_unknown_country_returns_none` | `"Wakanda"` | `None` | Not found |
| 8 | `test_get_capital_nonexistent_country_returns_none` | `"Neverland"` | `None` | Not found |

Parametrized countries: France, Germany, Japan, Brazil, India, Australia, Canada, Mexico, Italy, Spain, China, Russia, South Africa, Argentina, Nigeria

#### TestGetCapitalCaseInsensitivity ‚Äî 5 tests

| # | Test Name | Input | Expected | Category |
|---|-----------|-------|----------|----------|
| 9 | `test_get_capital_lowercase_country_returns_capital` | `"france"` | `"Paris"` | Case |
| 10 | `test_get_capital_uppercase_country_returns_capital` | `"FRANCE"` | `"Paris"` | Case |
| 11 | `test_get_capital_mixed_case_country_returns_capital` | `"fRaNcE"` | `"Paris"` | Case |
| 12 | `test_get_capital_lowercase_multiword_returns_capital` | `"united states"` | `"Washington, D.C."` | Case + Multi-word |
| 13 | `test_get_capital_leading_trailing_whitespace_stripped` | `"  France  "` | `"Paris"` | Whitespace |

| 14 | `test_validate_valid_name_returns_true` | `"France"` | `True` | Validation |
| 15 | `test_validate_multiword_name_returns_true` | `"United States"` | `True` | Validation |
| 16 | `test_validate_empty_string_returns_false` | `""` | `False` | Invalid input |
| 17 | `test_validate_whitespace_only_returns_false` | `"   "` | `False` | Invalid input |
| 18 | `test_validate_digits_only_returns_false` | `"123"` | `False` | Invalid input |
| 19 | `test_validate_special_chars_only_returns_false` | `"@#$%"` | `False` | Invalid input |
| 20 | `test_validate_name_with_hyphen_returns_true` | `"Guinea-Bissau"` | `True` | Special chars |
| 21 | `test_validate_name_with_apostrophe_returns_true` | `"Cote d'Ivoire"` | `True` | Special chars |

---

## How to Run Tests

```bash
# Create virtual environment (one time)
python3.9 -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate

# Install dependencies
pip install -r requirements.txt

# Run all tests with coverage
pytest tests/ -v

# Run only unit tests
pytest tests/unit/ -v

# Run only integration tests
pytest tests/integration/ -v

# Run single test
pytest tests/unit/test_country_service.py::TestGetCapital::test_get_capital_france_returns_paris -v

# HTML coverage report
pytest tests/ --cov=src --cov-report=html
open htmlcov/index.html
```

---

## How to Run the API Locally

```bash
source .venv/bin/activate
uvicorn src.main:app --reload --port 8000
```

Interactive docs: `http://localhost:8000/docs`

---

## Sample curl Commands

```bash
# Happy path ‚Äî France
curl -s http://localhost:8000/countries/France/capital | python3 -m json.tool
# {"country": "France", "capital": "Paris"}

# Case insensitive
curl -s http://localhost:8000/countries/france/capital | python3 -m json.tool
# {"country": "france", "capital": "Paris"}

# Multi-word country
curl -s "http://localhost:8000/countries/United%20States/capital" | python3 -m json.tool
# {"country": "United States", "capital": "Washington, D.C."}

# 404 ‚Äî unknown country
curl -s http://localhost:8000/countries/Wakanda/capital | python3 -m json.tool
# {"detail": "Country not found: Wakanda"}

# 400 ‚Äî invalid input (digits)
curl -s http://localhost:8000/countries/123/capital | python3 -m json.tool
# {"detail": "Invalid country name"}

# Health check
curl -s http://localhost:8000/health | python3 -m json.tool
# {"status": "healthy"}
```

---

## Dataset Coverage

The API includes **100+ countries** covering:
- All G20 nations
- All UN Security Council permanent members
- Major countries across all continents
- Countries with hyphenated names (Guinea-Bissau, Timor-Leste)
- Countries with apostrophes in name (Cote d'Ivoire)
- Multi-word countries (United States, United Kingdom, South Africa, Saudi Arabia, etc.)
